name: Medical Check-Up
shortDescription: Comprehensive medical examinations for health screening, visa applications, and pre-employment requirements.
fullDescription: Our Medical Check-Up service provides thorough health assessments for various purposes including routine preventive care, visa and immigration requirements, pre-employment medicals, and insurance screening. Our check-up packages include physical examination, blood work, urinalysis, ECG, chest X-ray (referral), and a detailed consultation with one of our physicians.
